original_query: select nation, o_year, sum(amount) as sum_profit from ( select n_name as nation, extract(year from o_orderdate) as o_year, l_extendedprice * (1 - l_discount) - ps_supplycost * l_quantity as amount from part, supplier, lineitem, partsupp, orders, nation where s_suppkey = l_suppkey and ps_suppkey = l_suppkey and ps_partkey = l_partkey and p_partkey = l_partkey and o_orderkey = l_orderkey and s_nationkey = n_nationkey and p_name like '%red%' ) as profit group by nation, o_year order by nation, o_year desc;
rewritten_query:
select nation, o_year, sum(amount) as sum_profit from (
  select 
    n_name as nation, 
    extract(year from o_orderdate) as o_year, 
    l_extendedprice * (1 - l_discount) - ps_supplycost * l_quantity as amount 
  from part
  INNER JOIN lineitem ON part.p_partkey = lineitem.l_partkey
  INNER JOIN partsupp ON lineitem.l_partkey = partsupp.ps_partkey AND lineitem.l_suppkey = partsupp.ps_suppkey
  INNER JOIN orders ON lineitem.l_orderkey = orders.o_orderkey
  INNER JOIN supplier ON lineitem.l_suppkey = supplier.s_suppkey
  INNER JOIN nation ON supplier.s_nationkey = nation.n_nationkey
  WHERE part.p_name LIKE '%red%'
) as profit 
group by nation, o_year 
order by nation, o_year desc;

rewrite_suggestion.produced_suggestion: Replaced implicit joins with explicit INNER JOIN syntax to improve readability and potentially help the optimizer choose a better join order
Moved join conditions from WHERE clause to the ON clauses of each JOIN to make the join relationships clearer
Isolated the filter condition on p_name in the WHERE clause, separating it from join conditions
